name: scout_then_build
description: One scout sub-agent, then one plan_build AIW. Use when you want informed planning before implementation.

scout_focus.default: the affected module(s) and their conventions

prompt.description: What the plan_build AIW should implement.

steps.description: Read-only recon of the affected area.
steps.user_prompt: Scout ${inputs.scout_focus} for an upcoming plan_build. List the entry points, types, and any pitfalls.

steps.description: Plan + build AIW. The planner inherits the scout's report from your context.
